title: Clear Your Throat with 8 Herbal Tinctures for Older Adults with Mucus
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tinctures are made from the roots of the licorice plant, a natural remedy for soothing a sore throat and reducing mucus buildup. The tincture contains compounds like glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These properties help to break down and clear out excess mucus, reducing congestion and discomfort in the throat.
